title: Empty default clauses should be removed
description: Empty "default" clauses should be removedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEunusedfindingclumsyWhy is this an issue?Thedefaultclause should take appropriate action. Having an emptydefaultis a waste of keystrokes.Noncompliant code exampleenum Fruit { Apple, Orange, Banana } void PrintName(Fruit fruit) { switch(fruit) { case Fruit.Apple: Console.WriteLine("apple"); break; default: //Noncompliant break; } }Compliant solutionenum Fruit { Apple, Orange, Banana } void PrintName(Fruit fruit) { switch(fruit) { case Fruit.Apple: Console.WriteLine("apple"); break; default: throw new NotSupportedException(); } }orvoid PrintName(Fruit fruit) { switch(fruit) { case Fruit.Apple: Console.WriteLine("apple"); break; } }Exce
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

logic.detection_conditions: Methods with switch statements containing empty default clauses (only break or whitespace)
logic.triggering_conditions: default: followed only by whitespace/comments and break (no other statements)
logic.exclusion_conditions: Excludes defaults with actual logic, throw statements, return with values, or logging
logic.never_trigger_on: Default clauses with throw, return non-void, logging, or any actual statement besides break
logic.reasoning: Empty default clauses waste keystrokes and provide no value. Either remove them or add meaningful handling (throw, log, etc). Pattern detects 'default:' followed by optional whitespace/comments then 'break;' with nothing else. Excludes defaults with any other statements.

should_trigger: switch(fruit) { case Fruit.Apple: Handle(); break; default: break; }
switch(status) { case Status.Active: Process(); break; default: /* empty */ break; }
switch(value) { case 1: Do(); break; default: break; }
should_not_trigger: switch(fruit) { case Fruit.Apple: Handle(); break; default: throw new NotSupportedException(); }
switch(status) { case Status.Active: Process(); break; default: Console.WriteLine("unknown"); break; }

checks.message: Remove empty default clause or add meaningful handling
